hero.title: Die europäische Referenzdatenbank für
hero.subtitle: Umfassende, unabhängige Bewertungen von KI-Systemen in der Europäischen Union — abgebildet auf den AI Act, die DSGVO, DORA und sektorspezifische Vorschriften.

featured.title: Ausgewählte KI-Systeme
featured.subtitle: Unabhängige Bewertungen führender KI-Plattformen in europäischen Unternehmen.

howItWorks.title: So funktioniert es
howItWorks.subtitle: Unsere rigorose, transparente Methodik stellt sicher, dass jede Bewertung höchsten Standards an Unabhängigkeit und Genauigkeit entspricht.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Wir beobachten kontinuierlich den europäischen Markt auf KI-Systeme in Unternehmensumgebungen und erfassen neue Anbieter und Aktualisierungen.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Jedes System wird gemäß den Risikoklassen des EU AI Acts klassifiziert und branchenspezifischen Vorschriften zugeordnet.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Unabhängige Analysten bewerten jedes System anhand mehrerer Regulierungsrahmen mit unserer standardisierten Bewertungsmethodik.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Compliance-Bewertungen werden mit vollständiger methodischer Transparenz veröffentlicht, einschließlich detaillierter Aufschlüsselungen und Belegen.

cta.title: KI-Compliance-Intelligenz
cta.subtitle: Wöchentlicher Digest mit neuen KI-Tool-Bewertungen, regulatorischen Änderungen und Compliance-Analysen.

frameworks.whatThisMeans: What this means for your organisation
frameworks.heroSubtitle: We assess AI systems against {count} European regulatory frameworks. Each framework defines specific requirements for AI compliance.

browseIndustry.heroSubtitle: Explore AI systems relevant to your industry with tailored compliance insights across {count} sectors.

assessment.disclaimerText: This assessment is based on publicly available information as of the last review date. Scores reflect what can be verified from vendor documentation, trust centers, and public certifications. For a verified assessment tailored to your specific use case, contact us for a tailored assessment.

subscribe.title: Get AI Compliance Updates

subscribe.privacyNote: We store only your email and topic preferences. No tracking, no profiling.
subscribe.magicLinkNote: We'll send you a magic link. No password to remember.
subscribe.checkEmailText: We sent a sign-in link to
subscribe.linkExpiry: Click the link to access your account. The link expires in 15 minutes.
subscribe.didntReceive: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or

footer.tagline: The comprehensive platform for tracking, analyzing, and understanding AI systems operating within the European Union regulatory framework.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AI Compass EU. All rights reserved.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: AI Compass EU provides information for educational and professional purposes. Our assessments are based on publicly available information and should not be considered legal advice. Consult qualified legal professionals for specific compliance requirements.
footer.aiTransparencyBody: This platform uses AI (Anthropic Claude) for its chatbot assistant and comparison tool. AI-generated responses are grounded in our assessed database and clearly labelled. No personal data is used for AI model training. All AI features comply with the EU AI Act transparency obligations (Article 50) and GDPR requirements for automated processing.

nav.rfpEngineDesc: Answer vendor RFPs with pre-filled responses

home.title: AI Compass EU — AI Intelligence for European Decision-Makers
home.description: Comprehensive, independent assessments of AI systems across the European Union — mapped against the AI Act, GDPR, DORA, and sector-specific regulations.

database.title: AI Database
database.description: Browse and search AI systems rated for European compliance. Filter by risk level, industry, regulation, and compliance score.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for AI compliance intelligence. Free tier available; Pro from EUR 19/month.

about.title: About
about.description: AI Compass EU is the independent European reference for AI tool intelligence — serving DPOs, CISOs, and compliance professionals.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.description: How we rate AI systems against EU regulations. Transparent, multi-framework assessment with evidence references.

reports.title: Reports & White Papers
reports.description: Free research reports on AI adoption, compliance, data privacy, and security in Europe. Expert analysis for DPOs, CISOs, and compliance professionals.

regulations.title: Regulations
regulations.description: The major European regulatory frameworks for AI — AI Act, GDPR, DORA, NIS2, sector rules — with requirements, timelines, and penalties.

industries.title: Industries
industries.description: AI systems by sector. Tailored compliance insights for financial services, healthcare, public sector, HR, manufacturing, and more.

evidenceBanner.title: Preview — evidence sources under verification
evidenceBanner.body: Claims on this page are being re-verified against each vendor's trust centre, DPA, sub-processor list, and certification registries. Every claim will carry a source link and verification date once the backfill is complete. If you rely on this data for a procurement decision today, verify independently against the vendor's source documents.
